sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n642" key="a)glao/qumos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγλαό-θῡμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n642.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">noble-hearted,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.40.25</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Cometas</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
